channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump speaks after hours-long delay for Freedom 250 event due to severe weather
item.description: President Trump spoke in Washington, D.C., at the "Salute to America" Freedom 250 event on the Fourth of July. He highlighted veterans, the Artemis II...

item.title: Massive funeral for slain supreme leader enters second day
item.description: The multi-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in February by U.S.-Israeli strikes, has featured calls for revenge.

item.title: Trump promotes American 'golden age' and criticizes communism in July 4th address
item.description: A speech on the National Mall was delayed by two hours due to severe weather, during which President Trump blended politics with historical reflection.

item.title: Severe weather disrupts July 4th events, leading to brief evacuation of National Mall
item.description: Americans marked 250 years of independence on the Fourth of July, though severe weather dampened celebrations in several regions.
